name: Dome Room
description: You are standing along the edge of a large domed chamber, looking down into a space that was clearly designed to be observed rather than occupied. A wooden railing runs the perimeter, offering just enough protection to discourage accidents without fully inspiring confidence. The dome above curves smoothly, its construction suggesting careful planning for a problem no longer explained. Somewhere below lies a lower chamber, separated from you by height, intention, and a lack of guardrails.
